hero.art_prompt: Isha, a 28 year old Indian woman in smart professional attire, confident, working on a laptop with a subtle world-map style backdrop of soft shapes, modern office, global and aspirational.

panels.narration: Isha was already good at working across markets at work.
panels.img_prompt: Isha, 28, confidently coordinating an international deal on a laptop and phone, capable and focused, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
panels.img_prompt: Isha looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from coordinating to leading global business, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then she found an online MBA in International Business.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Isha's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in International Business, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Isha enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Isha confidently starting her first international business lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In International Business
points: Master the real craft: global trade, cross-border strategy, export-import and international marketing.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.
